## Constraints

<!--
  REQUIRED: hard constraints OpenCode must respect.
  Examples: "do not add dependencies", "match existing code style", "keep under 250 LOC".
-->

- Do not edit outside Allowed Paths.
- Do not commit, push, deploy, reset, stash, clean, or launch interactive tools.
- Inspect only the files needed for this implementation; stop and report a blocker
  instead of broadening the task.
